violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food stored on the floor of the walk-in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Duct tape on the shelving holding food in the refrigerator.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cart in the kitchen has excess build-up of dust and food debris.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Containers of spoons across from the hot window have the food contact surface up, and should be inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors underneath kitchen equipment, and both walk-in cooler and freezer floors need to be cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
